text.title: weekend in seattle ☁️☕️ | what i eat, cafés & flea market
text.u: hi my name is Julia and I'm a California
corporate girly who loves to overshare
her life on the internet and on today's
episode of my life my friend and I
spontaneously decided to fly to Seattle
for the weekend but since I work I had
to wake up at 4:00 a.m. to catch a
flight so I can make it in time to log
on for work we spent the weekend trying
different coffee shops eating some
questionable food getting spoiled by our
bartender and just having fun exploring
Seattle without further Ado here's our
3-day weekend Bender in
[Music]
Seattle
um guess where we are Seattle
SE it's freezing cold wait we got like
bundled up and everything so we checked
the price for the Uber and it was like
$100 million so we're going to take the
Link light rail and it'll be a new
experience you know I've never taken it
so we'll
see um $3 we're saving so much money
Uber was like $60 this is sick this is
Si
like guys when you come to Seattle take
the
[Music]
link oh my God is this Grand Central
[Music]
Station um
bro wait and the view is like kind of
ugly oh it's not that bad it's just like
down there's kind of ugly but the view
is kind of nice anyway so we just got
into the room why is the sink in the
hallway oh what color should I make the
bathroom well you can change the color
um
blue wait what is already yo wait what
this place is so interesting fit check
fit check marshmallow Aria puffer Aria
sweat marshmallow Aria sweat unique glow
Brandy Melville uni glow New Balance T
and I wait I'm like all let's go eat
some food what should we get guys
comment down below um I want like a

y just walking downtown in

um
yeah I'm just so hungry we got to keep I
feel like once we like settle down get
some food like I'll be fine where is it
it's it's past there my God Public

Market this

got fire we just wanted to stop here
before we go get coffee and do some work
meal one of the day wait yours is hot
are you kidding
me yeah here eat my crusty wait
what wa this is so
good

okay let's go what here oh gu that's why
we're going to
[Music]

uniqu okay so at this point we were
really really hungry and we spent like
half an hour trying to find this Chinese
restaurant like I swear we walked all
over the market for this place and then
we finally found it and it was
underground but anyway so I ordered the
broccoli beef with rice and I think this
was the most disappointing meal I've
ever had like it was so bad that it was
comical literally someone tell me why
the beef was bouncy like I'm confused
why was this meal almost
$30 what are you

chea

that not so cute adorable oh there's the
aquarium too um you want to go this

way

have to change up the plan yeah so
hopefully this place is open but if not
it'll just be another

so I'm going to leave my scarf yeah like
my scarf is not

you is it yummy yeah it

just finished dinner we're going to go
get some desserts so the Negroni like it
didn't really hit me wa it was so strong
wait what it hasn't hit me girl wa also
like it's like negative 500 million de
and we're getting ice cream
oh H should we like get ice cream or
should we like go to the club comment
below should we go to the club or should
we get ice cream sounds like a clear
answer to me mhm ice

hello hello it's 6:30 in the morning I
just went outside to walk because the
hotel didn't have a gym I'm at the pier
right now I don't know if it's like safe
to be walking around but like it's so
peaceful and quiet right now other than
the traffic obviously but but like no
one's out this is why I love waking up
so early is cuz like no one else is
awake I can just like be by myself just
think clearly the day is fresh get
myself into the right mental space drink
my little coffee except now it's like
cold because it's freaking 30° outside
right now so my fingers are going to
freeze off but I have like two layers of
heattech under I have leggings
underneath my sweats but yeah that's the
vibe right now B
check
[Music]
it's so pretty I just love this like
City View feel like I'm meant to be in a
city as much as I love living in the
suburbs I feel like living somewhere
like this just seems like so fun and
just walk outside and like this is what
I see that's crazy it's just so
pretty guys I freaking found the water
look H it's so nice I actually haven't
gotten time for myself in a really long
time and being out here where there's
like so much space it feels so weird I'm
always so stuck at home I'm looking here
like everything just seems so possible I
don't know what it is like on one hand I
have the water here and then it's like
City like what this is crazy not me like
I love it this is so
nice
[Music]
[Music]
it's so pretty here I'm like

shook

coffee bookstore sushi
that sounds so
fun yeah and a rooftop Lounge maybe
we'll see don't P me on that yeah yeah
yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah we're
going yeah

yeah I'm

excited
[Music]

right this looks empty so
like
[Music]
[Music]
[Music]
hello guess where we're going sushi
we're going to fob sushi bar I saw it on
Tik Tok so hopefully it's good update
unfortunately the place was closed so
sad but uh we're going to Sugo hand
rolls bar instead hopefully that's good
we're walking it'll take like 8 minutes
byebye this was a cute sushi bar but
honestly I didn't really like how
everyone was facing in towards each
other maybe I'm just shy but it makes me
nervous and I hate random eye contact
but anyway I ordered a salmon hand roll
and an and a and and and an new ah ah
what and the noggy hand roll with a side
of miso soup it was pretty yummy but not
the best handrolls I've ever had they
also gave us these grape gummies and
they were so
yummy and on our walk back after lunch
we found this coffee shop and I saw that
they had blueberry matcha and y'all know
I'm a sucker for anything matcha so I
had to try it and I think this was
probably my favorite matcha fruit
concoction ever better than strawberry
matcha 10 out of 10 not too sweet I know
doul in La makes a blueberry matcha but
it's way too sweet and this one was
Perfection we're on our way to a rooftop
bar what little drinks a little snack
I'm really hungry so I might like order
a little more of the snacky so we'll

finally usually yours always tastes good

a could I interest you guys in a gummy
beer

little derer cuz it looked exactly like

let's go do this

it's so cute I love that I sent it to my

ball salted caramel
beisa it's good if you like caramel

number two three m

so after grabbing coffee at a room I was
really hungry and we found this Bagel
Spot across the street and it was such a
Vibe here they had crosswood puzzles and
really really good bagels I got a lock
bagel with zitar and spicy garlic cream
cheese which was like a flavor explosion
in my mouth it was so good it was so
yummy and such a cozy spot to hang
out
[Music]
so
cute wait wait this is beanie like
literally
[Music]
beanie

[Music]
like
just a little like some technical
difficulties right now I'm so excited
this looks so yummy I've been wanting
this all

like one of the crazy
rules
fire oh my God yeah mhm mhm guys you
need to come here if you ever come to
Seattle Bob sushi bar
fire I eat like fire so good chili
garlic so good fire
[Music]
fire
[Music]
pachio Machel latte taste
test M wait it's like really Pachi it's
not sweet at all let try it it's
yummy started at py hi um I'm not sure
which one I want but which one came out
recently the almondine or the chocolate
I just want whatever's
warm can I do the Almond one okay what
you getting a fresh one for
[Music]
[Music]
me
[Music]
I'm going to get that one and then we're
also going to do a Caesar salad to share
I'm so
hungry so this was our last dinner of
our Seattle trip we ended up ordering
the parad deli Caesar salad and or
rigatoni the parad deli was mid but
lowkey I think maybe they forgot to add
the salt but the riet Tony was
absolutely fire and I think this was the
perfect end to our trip I had such a fun
time in Seattle this weekend and I
definitely want to come back in the
future there's so many more coffee shops
and restaurants I want to try and
hopefully recommend to you guys I hope
you guys enjoyed this little travel Vlog
because I love sharing all my Ventures
with y'all I love you so so so so much
and I'll catch you guys next week
bye-bye
[Music]
n
